name: SCC_SLAC_GetAttenResults
title: SCC_SLAC_GetAttenResults
syntax: void SCC_SLAC_GetAttenResults ( float Results[], long& ResultCount )
description: Queries the measured average attenuation values during the callback SCC_SLACFinishedInd.

parameters.name: Results
parameters.description: Array to which the attenuation results are written. The results are returned sorted, starting with the lowest attenuation.
